metadata.description: AI-assisted project governance scaffold with mandatory quality gates

plugins.name: forge-kit-governance
plugins.description: Core ticket gate, gate-ticket command, and forge-adapt skill. Install this first.

plugins.name: forge-kit-review
plugins.description: Code review agents (code-reviewer, architect-review, backend-architect) and full-review/pr-enhance commands.

plugins.name: forge-kit-security
plugins.description: Security agents (security-auditor, backend-security-coder, api-security-tester) and OWASP checklist skill.

plugins.name: forge-kit-backend
plugins.description: Backend architecture and API design skills.
